# cloneSolutionFromTemplate

> Creates a new solution from a template

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| templateId | string | yes |
| organizationId | string | yes |
| name | string | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[template: call findSolutionTemplateById]
  A --> B[solution: call createSolution]
  B --> C[incrementDownloads: call updateSolutionTemplate]
  C --> D[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `Solution`
